member.name: M:GTA.World.GetCrosshairCoordinates(GTA.IntersectFlags,GTA.Entity)
member.summary: Determines where the crosshair intersects with the world.
member.param: Type of environment the raycast should intersect with.

Prevent the raycast detecting a specific
.
member.returns:
A
containing information about where the crosshair intersects with the world.
